name: /plugin-install runs the bundled RuleTester-equivalent test suite over the plugin and refuses registration when any test fails
command:
mkdir -p stub-clones/acme/badtests && printf 'name: badtests
rules:
  - id: foo
    detector: rubric/detectors/foo.sh
' > stub-clones/acme/badtests/plugin.yaml && mkdir -p stub-clones/acme/badtests/tests/foo/invalid && printf '{"code":"x","errors":[{"messageId":"m1"}]}
' > stub-clones/acme/badtests/tests/foo/invalid/case.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-install.sh" acme/badtests --gh-clone-stub stub-clones --rule-tester-stub fail 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'rule_tester_failed' err.txt && grep -q 'registration_blocked' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
